title: arenaria muralis
intro: Arenaria muralis, also known as sea campion, is a flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family and is native to the coastal regions of Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Arenaria muralis include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Arenaria muralis can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other respiratory conditions.
